business_description.nature_of_business: Texas-based hospitality operator owning and managing a portfolio of hotels and restaurants across Austin, San Antonio, and Fredericksburg, TX

coverages_discussed.notes: 8 locations; aggregate TIV $168,230,000 comprising Building Value $101,570,000, Contents Value $26,150,000, BI Value $40,510,000. All locations sprinklered. 2 property claims with $178,566 paid and $215,927 total incurred per loss summary. Expiring premium reflects total program premium across all lines.
8 claims per loss summary; $8,780 paid, $82,656 incurred. Favorable paid-to-incurred ratio. Occupancies include hotel and restaurant operations.
28 claims per loss summary; $324,545 paid, $415,934 incurred. Open/developing exposure indicated by $91,389 gap between paid and incurred. High frequency relative to GL and Property lines.

positives: Strong construction quality: 5 of 8 locations are Fire Resistive or Masonry Non-Combustible
Solid balance sheet with $52,535,400 equity and total assets of $77,004,300; debt-to-equity ratio approximately 0.47
Positive net income of $3,220,600 demonstrating operational profitability
Modern property portfolio with construction dates ranging 1998–2015; majority built post-2000
Low GL severity: only $8,780 paid across 8 claims indicating well-managed liability exposure
Low property claim frequency (2 claims) relative to portfolio size and TIV
Multiple named insured and additional insured entities reflect organized legal structure
Diversified occupancy mix across hotels, restaurants, and office
concerns: Claim count spiked to 11 in 2024 from 3 in 2023, a 267% year-over-year increase in claim frequency
High WC claim frequency (28 claims) is the dominant loss driver and warrants loss run detail
Total WC incurred ($415,934) exceeds paid ($324,545) by $91,389, suggesting open reserves on outstanding claims
Five different carriers in five policy years (2020–2024) indicates prior market difficulty or adverse loss experience
Total program premium increased approximately 18.2% from $580,805 (2020) to $686,236 (2024)
Drivers sheet contains no data; fleet and commercial auto risk cannot be assessed
LOC-008 Corporate Headquarters carries $0 building value; contents-only exposure may indicate leased premises — ownership and lease terms unconfirmed
Restaurant occupancies (LOC-005, LOC-006, LOC-007) introduce elevated GL and liquor liability exposure not separately quantified
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Five-year history (2020–2024) across five carriers totals 31 claim occurrences with program premiums ranging from $580,805.53 to $686,236.25. Loss summary (period unspecified) shows: WC — 28 claims, $324,545 paid, $415,934 incurred; GL — 8 claims, $8,780 paid, $82,656 incurred; Property — 2 claims, $178,566 paid, $215,927 incurred. Combined incurred across all lines: $714,517. Combined paid: $511,891. Overall loss development factor (incurred/paid): 1.40.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC is the named insured for a Texas hospitality portfolio consisting of 8 locations: 4 hotels (The Driskill Austin, Riverwalk Suites San Antonio, Fredericksburg Inn & Spa, South Congress Motor Hotel), 3 restaurants (Blanco River Steakhouse, The Oasis at Lake Travis, Mission Cantina - Pearl District), and 1 corporate office. Operations span Austin, San Antonio, and Fredericksburg, TX. Total Insured Value is $168,230,000. Annual revenue is $42,000,000. Total assets are $77,004,300 with equity of $52,535,400 and net income of $3,220,600. Nine legal entities are associated with the submission including the named insured, general partners, managing members, and affiliates.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Hotels: LOC-001 The Driskill Austin — 604 Brazos Street, Austin TX 78701, 8-story Fire Resistive, 95,000 sq ft, TPO roof, built 2010, TIV $46,312,500. LOC-002 Riverwalk Suites San Antonio — 112 College Street, San Antonio TX 78205, 12-story Fire Resistive, 142,000 sq ft, Metal roof, built 2006, TIV $64,610,000. LOC-003 Fredericksburg Inn & Spa — 245 East Main Street, Fredericksburg TX 78624, 3-story Masonry Non-Combustible, 48,000 sq ft, Built-Up roof, built 1998, TIV $17,160,000. LOC-004 South Congress Motor Hotel — 1220 South Congress Avenue, Austin TX 78704, 4-story Masonry Non-Combustible, 62,000 sq ft, Concrete roof, built 2015, TIV $25,187,500. Restaurants: LOC-005 Blanco River Steakhouse — 608 Brazos Street, Austin TX 78701, 1-story Fire Resistive, 8,500 sq ft, Metal roof, built 2010, TIV $5,100,000. LOC-006 The Oasis at Lake Travis — 6550 Comanche Trail, Austin TX 78732, 2-story Non-Combustible, 12,000 sq ft, EPDM roof, built 2012, TIV $5,700,000. LOC-007 Mission Cantina - Pearl District — 303 Pearl Parkway, San Antonio TX 78215, 1-story Joisted Masonry, 6,800 sq ft, EPDM roof, built 2014, TIV $3,230,000. Office: LOC-008 Corporate Headquarters — 401 Congress Avenue Suite 2800, Austin TX 78701, 1-story Fire Resistive, 6,200 sq ft, Shingle roof, built 2008, TIV $930,000 (contents and BI only).
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Five-year carrier and premium history: 2024 — Travelers Companies, $686,236.25, 11 claims; 2023 — Markel Corporation, $619,820.26, 3 claims; 2022 — Zurich Insurance Group, $607,294.45, 6 claims; 2021 — Chubb Limited, $630,843.20, 9 claims; 2020 — EMPLOYERS Insurance Group, $580,805.53, 2 claims. Loss summary by line: Workers Compensation — 28 claims, $324,545 paid, $415,934 incurred; General Liability — 8 claims, $8,780 paid, $82,656 incurred; Property — 2 claims, $178,566 paid, $215,927 incurred. Total all lines: 38 claims, $511,891 paid, $714,517 incurred.
